JUSTIFICATION

3. The existing Yuen Long Town centre is overcrowded with substantial pedestrian activities. Pedestrians walking along main streets (e.g. Yuen Long On Ning Road, Castle Peak Road – Yuen Long and Kau Yuk Road) in the district have to travel via narrow and congested footpaths so that they are at times forced onto the carriageway, resulting in potential safety problem. Currently, there are about 126 000 residents in the district. With the growth in population, stoppages or interruptions to pedestrian flow occur at some sections of at-grade footpaths. Therefore, there is an imminent need to relieve the prevailing congestion on at-grade footpaths and improve the pedestrian facilities to meet future needs with a view to providing a more comfortable, more convenient and safer walking environment for the community. In the 2017 Policy Agenda, it was reaffirmed that the Administration will strive to implement the Project to relieve congestion at footpaths and improve the environment for pedestrians in the district.
4. The proposed elevated pedestrian corridor can provide a direct route connecting the West Rail Long Ping Station and areas around Yuen Long On Ning Road, Castle Peak Road – Yuen Long and Kau Yuk Road, which will improve local pedestrian circulation in and enhance accessibility of the Yuen Long Town centre.
5. Upon commissioning of the proposed elevated pedestrian corridor, the pedestrian flow on at-grade footpaths and at road crossing facilities in the Yuen Long Town centre will be diverted effectively for relieving congestion and improving road safety. We expect that the busiest section of the proposed elevated pedestrian corridor (across Castle Peak Road – Yuen Long) can attract about 11 000 pedestrians per hour during peak hours. The proposed elevated pedestrian corridor of 6 m clear width can provide sufficient space for reasonable movement of pedestrians.

如果不斷強調17億做一條橋，但忽略入面工程實際所包含既工程係無意思的。

不過我覺得起條橋好無謂

老實講 政府一條天橋平均造價180,000/m2-350,000/m2 @current price左右。呢條橋總造價係大約520,000/m2（520米長，6米闊），睇落係好貴

但睇反pwsc paper入面橋本身既價錢係1138.7M. (365,000/m2，包埋MOD factor，我估計扣除MOD約為270,000/m2，所以價錢for條橋係comparable. (考慮溶洞問題既加乘，但同一時間該橋本身並非enclosed bridge 係用natural ventilation, E and M cost有相應減動。

但條橋橫跨輕軌及交通路段，相信大量TTM要做，加上日間施工限制因鄰近居民及車輛運輸，應該有大量晚間工程（Night Work)，會推高價格，仲有external works （室外綠化及渠務工程）同埋一堆lift同escalator，總包價17億（520,000/m2) 並非不合理。

大家仲要留意，520,000/m2係包埋10% contingencies,同埋相信大約1.35-1.4 MOD factor. 所以從價錢而言，我個人覺得唔係話天價（不合理工程價格）

如果不斷強調17億做一條橋，但忽略入面工程實際所包含既工程係無意思的。

老實講 政府一條天橋平均造價180,000/m2-350,000/m2 @current price左右。呢條橋總造價係大約520,000/m2（520米長，6米闊），睇落係好貴

但睇反pwsc paper入面橋本身既價錢係1138.7M. (365,000/m2，包埋MOD factor，我估計扣除MOD約為270,000/m2，所以價錢for條橋係comparable. (考慮溶洞問題既加乘，但同一時間該橋本身並非enclosed bridge 係用natural ventilation, E and M cost有相應減動。

但條橋橫跨輕軌及交通路段，相信大量TTM要做，加上日間施工限制因鄰近居民及車輛運輸，應該有大量晚間工程（Night Work)，會推高價格，仲有external works （室外綠化及渠務工程）同埋一堆lift同escalator，總包價17億（520,000/m2) 並非不合理。

大家仲要留意，520,000/m2係包埋10% contingencies,同埋相信大約1.35-1.4 MOD factor. 所以從價錢而言，我個人覺得唔係話天價（不合理工程價格）

如果不斷強調17億做一條橋，但忽略入面工程實際所包含既工程係無意思的。

不過我覺得起條橋好無謂

pinned.msg:
老實講 政府一條天橋平均造價180,000/m2-350,000/m2 @current price左右。呢條橋總造價係大約520,000/m2（520米長，6米闊），睇落係好貴

但睇反pwsc paper入面橋本身既價錢係1138.7M. (365,000/m2，包埋MOD factor，我估計扣除MOD約為270,000/m2，所以價錢for條橋係comparable. (考慮溶洞問題既加乘，但同一時間該橋本身並非enclosed bridge 係用natural ventilation, E and M cost有相應減動。

但條橋橫跨輕軌及交通路段，相信大量TTM要做，加上日間施工限制因鄰近居民及車輛運輸，應該有大量晚間工程（Night Work)，會推高價格，仲有external works （室外綠化及渠務工程）同埋一堆lift同escalator，總包價17億（520,000/m2) 並非不合理。

大家仲要留意，520,000/m2係包埋10% contingencies,同埋相信大約1.35-1.4 MOD factor. 所以從價錢而言，我個人覺得唔係話天價（不合理工程價格）

如果不斷強調17億做一條橋，但忽略入面工程實際所包含既工程係無意思的。

不過我覺得起條橋好無謂
